/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/gguf-hash.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/xxhash.dir/deps/xxhash/xxhash.c.o CMakeFiles/sha1.dir/deps/sha1/sha1.c.o CMakeFiles/sha256.dir/deps/sha256/sha256.c.o -o ../../bin/llama-gguf-hash  -Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/home/build-gpu-adreno/bin: ../../bin/libggml.so.0.12.0 -lpthread ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.12.0 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.12.0
